name: Hot Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the milk, vegetable oil, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Spread the batter evenly in an ungreased 9-inch square baking pan.
4. Combine the brown sugar and remaining baking cocoa; sprinkle over the batter.
5. Pour hot water over all ingredients, ensuring it covers the top of the batter.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
7. Serve warm. Top with ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
